text:
The Lukso Province (, Rukuso-chihō) is the former residence of the Kurta Clan, prior to their massacre by the Phantom Troupe. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 81 This province is not easily found, which is the reason why Kurta Clan members were able to hide themselves. Kurapika lived in the area during his early childhood.

Flora

The Lukso Province has an abundance of trees and plants with varying swirl patterns.

Fauna

Pikos were one way that Kurta Clan members traveled and transported items. Kurapika and Pairo used these birds to ride back and forth from the village to the province and to carry the groceries obtained for the third test. When journeying to the outside world, Kurapika also used one. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 0, Chapter 1 Hunter × Hunter - Volume 0, Chapter 2 Another type of large bird, with green plumage and a curved beak, was native to the province. Hunter × Hunter: Phantom Rouge 

Inhabitants

Trivia

In Esperanto, "lukso" translates as "luxury."
